use_cases: Showcasing product or service features with animated hover effects
Displaying feature highlights in a visually engaging card format
Creating interactive feature grids with color-coded categories
ai_summary: An animated feature card component with color variants (orange, purple, blue) featuring hover lift animations and shadow transitions. Uses Framer Motion for smooth spring-based animations and CSS custom properties for theming. Ideal for showcasing SaaS features, product highlights, or service descriptions in an interactive card format with gradient accents and modern card styling.
